description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests Runner that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests. The workflow should have two jobs: linux-test and windows-test. The linux-test job should run on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with Python 3.7 and 3.11, and the windows-test job should run on windows-latest with Python 3.7 and 3.11. Each job should check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies, build and install the package, and run tests with pytest.
